integrity_flags: DC fast / AC slow charge times: NOT published for any large-bus models. Asiastar only says 'supports ordinary and fast charging'.
YBL6029BEV / YBL6109BEV exact kWh and range: UNVERIFIED — brief's 151-255kWh / 136kW figures could not be confirmed.
JS6128HEV as a distinct hybrid chassis: no standalone sheet; JS6128GHBEV running gear used as proxy.
Australian press 105.6kWh/120kW/300km figures are for LIGHT COMMERCIAL VANS — do NOT merge into bus catalog.
